problem id: d117113e
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(7) AND SHR(2)

examples:
  10010011 -> 00000000
  00111111 -> 00001111
  00001000 -> 00000000
  10110110 -> 00001001
  11011010 -> 00100100
  00111100 -> 00001110
  10001101 -> 00000010
  00000110 -> 00000001

query: 01010101
predicted answer: 00000000
